answer: Importance: High Good Afternoon- If you are aware of any other participants for the meeting at the Governor's office on Monday, November 27, please forward this email to them ASAP! Please contact Joe Ronan at joer@calpine.com / 925-600-2085 with the names as well. [msg: <20293939.1075843044959.JavaMail.evans@thyme>] [msg: <33001577.1075843044983.JavaMail.evans@thyme>] susan.mara@enron.com jeff.dasovich@enron.com Here you go ----- Forwarded by Susan J Mara/NA/Enron on 11/22/2000 02:25 PM ----- Jack Pigott 11/22/2000 02:01 PM To: "'Susan.J.Mara@enron.com'" cc: Sue - Calpine is hosting a pre-meeting at a law firm near the Governor's office in L.A. Enron is invited, so please forward this to the appropriate people. [msg: <20293939.1075843044959.JavaMail.evans@thyme>]
